[{'type': 'Bug', 'conclusion': '修复了仅在安装特定extra时才激活chardet的逻辑，避免虚假警告。', 'description': '在`src/requests/__init__.py`中，用于检测`[use-chardet-on-py3]` extra是否存在的逻辑存在缺陷。代码通过检查`requires("requests")`返回的列表中，是否存在以`'chardet'`开头且包含`'use-chardet-on-py3'`字符串的条目。然而，`requires()`返回的条目格式为`'chardet>=3.0.2,<8 ; extra == "use-chardet-on-py3"'`。当前逻辑`'use-chardet-on-py3' in (r.split(";")[-1] if ";" in r else "")`会错误地将`'use-chardet-on-py3'`与`'extra == "use-chardet-on-py3"'`进行子字符串匹配。这可能导致匹配失败，因为字符串包含引号和空格。例如，`'use-chardet-on-py3' in 'extra == "use-chardet-on-py3"'` 返回 `True`，但`'use-chardet-on-py3' in 'extra == "use_chardet_on_py3"'` 返回 `False`（因为使用了不同的分隔符）。虽然测试用例中使用了带引号的字符串，但实际环境中标记的格式（如使用下划线还是连字符，是否带引号）可能不一致，导致逻辑不可靠。', 'evidence': 'python
_chardet_extra = any(
    'use-chardet-on-py3' in (r.split(";")[-1] if ";" in r else "")
     for r in _reqs
     if r.lower().startswith("chardet")
)
', 'advice': '建议使用更健壮的方法来解析extra标记。可以利用`packaging`库（requests可能已依赖）来解析标记字符串，或者使用更精确的字符串匹配逻辑，例如检查标记字符串是否包含`'use-chardet-on-py3'`或`'use_chardet_on_py3'`（规范化后）。一个简单的改进是：`marker = r.split(';')[-1].strip() if ';' in r else ''`，然后检查`'use-chardet-on-py3' in marker.replace('_', '-').replace('"', '').replace("'", '')`。', 'confidence': 0.8, 'severity': 'Medium'}, {'type': 'Readability', 'conclusion': '修复了仅在安装特定extra时才激活chardet的逻辑，避免虚假警告。', 'description': '在`src/requests/__init__.py`中，用于判断extra的逻辑内联在一个复杂的生成器表达式中，可读性较差。变量命名`_chardet_extra`是布尔值，但名称更像一个列表或对象。复杂的单行逻辑不利于理解和后续维护。', 'evidence': 'python
_chardet_extra = any(
    'use-chardet-on-py3' in (r.split(";")[-1] if ";" in r else "")
     for r in _reqs
     if r.lower().startswith("chardet")
)
', 'advice': '将逻辑提取到一个单独的小函数中，例如`_has_chardet_extra(requirements_list)`，提高可读性和可测试性。在函数内部可以使用更清晰的循环和条件判断。', 'confidence': 0.9, 'severity': 'Low'}, {'type': 'Design', 'conclusion': '修复了仅在安装特定extra时才激活chardet的逻辑，避免虚假警告。', 'description': '代码变更依赖于`importlib.metadata.requires()`，该函数在Python 3.8及以上版本的标准库中可用。对于使用Python 3.7或更早版本的用户，此代码将回退到`except (ImportError, PackageNotFoundError): pass`，这会导致`chardet_version`始终为`None`，即使用户安装了`[use-chardet-on-py3]` extra。这可能会破坏在旧版本Python上依赖此功能的用户。虽然变更说明提到了“stdlib >=3.8”，但代码本身没有为旧版本提供替代方案（例如回退到`pkg_resources`，尽管它较重）。', 'evidence': 'python
from importlib.metadata import requires, PackageNotFoundError
...
except (ImportError, PackageNotFoundError):
    pass
', 'advice': '考虑为Python <3.8添加一个回退机制，例如尝试导入`importlib_metadata`后备包（许多项目已将其作为依赖），或者至少在此情况下记录一个调试信息，说明无法检测extra，因此chardet未被激活。这可以确保功能在支持的Python版本范围内一致工作。', 'confidence': 0.7, 'severity': 'Medium'}]
commits:
[{'sha': '4e830e5e2d278f6a7aa47edd26b45bc7a0ba5160', 'message': 'fix: only activate chardet when [use-chardet-on-py3] extra is installed

Closes #7223. Previously, requests imported chardet at startup whenever it
was importable, regardless of whether the user installed
requests[use-chardet-on-py3]. This caused spurious
RequestsDependencyWarning when a transitive dependency (e.g. tox) pulled
in an unsupported chardet version.

Fix: use importlib.metadata.requires() (stdlib >=3.8) to check for the
extra marker before importing chardet. Handles underscore/hyphen
normalisation and degrades gracefully if metadata is unavailable.'}]
review_comments:
["Hi @bibekmhj, thanks for the PR. Unfortunately, I don't think this works.

The warning is intentional because Requests will use `chardet` when it's present. As stated in the other issues, there's usually <24 hours of overlap from when chardet releases and when the warning is updated. This specific release was an exception.

The code in this PR is always true, so the behavior doesn't actually change. The requirement you're checking cannot detect what was run at installation, it only knows what extras are available. The reason your test passes is you've changed the value to `use_chardet_on_py3` for the tests you want to fail and `use-chardet-on-py3` for the ones you want to pass."]

was importable, regardless of whether the user installed
requests[use-chardet-on-py3]. This caused spurious
RequestsDependencyWarning when a transitive dependency (e.g. tox) pulled
in an unsupported chardet version.

Fix: use importlib.metadata.requires() (stdlib >=3.8) to check for the
extra marker before importing chardet. Handles underscore/hyphen
normalisation and degrades gracefully if metadata is unavailable.'}]

commits:
[{'sha': '96ef1dec123e8ecef55e77fad36f783d99d37bdc', 'message': "Preserve leading slashes in request path_url

Fixes issue where S3 presigned URLs with keys starting with '/'
were incorrectly modified, breaking URL signatures.

URLs like 'https://bucket.s3.amazonaws.com//key_name' now
correctly preserve '//key_name' in the path_url.

Closes #6711"}]
review_comments: ["Hi @typhon8, thanks for the PR. Unfortunately, this is breaking. We specifically changed the behavior to handle ambiguous paths failing in urllib3.\r\n\r\nI've added https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/pull/4952 to urllib3 which should fix the behavior in their next release. At that point we can revisit removing this from Requests. We do not want to remove the test though, that is required to still function before we make any changes."]

review: [{'type': 'Rightness', 'conclusion': '修复Response.iter_lines的重入调用问题，支持多次调用', 'description': '代码变更主要目的是修复Response.iter_lines()方法的重入调用问题。通过在Response对象中持久化行缓冲状态，使得多次调用iter_lines()时能够正确处理未消费的数据。新增的测试用例验证了重入调用和单迭代器场景的正确性。', 'evidence': '', 'advice': '', 'confidence': 0.9, 'severity': 'Low'}]
commits:
[{'sha': 'ad190688ad692addb5af3cf04baaaec1238356df', 'message': 'Fix Response.iter_lines reentrant calls

Persist line-buffer state across repeated iter_lines() calls on the same
streaming response and add coverage for the reentrant and single-iterator
cases.'}]
review_comments:
['Hi @fr3y123, thanks for the PR. While this is a clever approach, I'm not sure it solves the "re-entrancy" issue. We're now maintaining shared mutable state of the Response which I think violates the concept. Having things like delimiter or pending outside of the method means two readers will inherently corrupt each others data.

There's also the issue of the streaming case which breaks here. That's because we have a single ephemeral source (the raw response). Unless everything can be buffered by iter_content _and_ you enforce the whole stream is read by a single caller on the first pass, you're going to have issues. This is the primary use case for `iter_lines` because otherwise you could simply call `.split()` on `Response.content`.

The initial addition of the note + xfail was likely to indicate a fundamental API limitation rather than documenting something to fix. I don't know how we'd be able to keep track of individual reads in the same manner we can for `iter_content`.', 'Hi @nateprewitt, Thanks for the detailed explanation.

That makes sense. I was reading the xfail as a bug to fix, but your explanation clarified that this is really a limitation of a single streaming source rather than a straightforward correctness bug.

I’m reverted this on my side and closed out the PR. Thanks again for the clear review.']

review:
[{'type': 'Bug', 'conclusion': '修复 Response.iter_lines 方法在重入调用时的状态问题。', 'description': "代码变更的主要目的是修复 `Response.iter_lines` 方法在重入调用（即对同一个响应对象多次调用 `iter_lines`）时，内部缓冲区状态不一致导致的潜在问题。原代码在 `__init__` 中初始化了一个新的状态字典 `_iter_lines_state`，并在 `iter_lines` 方法中根据参数变化重置缓冲区，确保每次调用都能正确处理上次调用遗留的 `pending` 数据。然而，在 `iter_lines` 方法的最后，当 `pending` 为 `None` 时，代码将 `state['pending']` 设置为 `None`。这本身是正确的，但存在一个潜在问题：如果 `iter_lines` 方法在 `yield` 语句之后、但在方法结束前被中断（例如，迭代器被提前关闭或发生异常），`state['pending']` 可能不会被正确重置为 `None`，导致后续调用时状态混乱。虽然新增的测试覆盖了重入和单迭代器场景，但并未覆盖迭代器被部分消费后异常退出的情况。", 'evidence': '在 `iter_lines` 方法末尾：
python
        if pending is not None:
            state["pending"] = None
            yield pending
        else:
            state["pending"] = None

这段代码在 `pending` 为 `None` 时也会重置状态，但整个 `for` 循环和 `yield` 语句可能在中途退出。', 'advice': "建议考虑在 `iter_lines` 方法开始时，无论参数是否变化，都先将 `state['pending']` 初始化为 `None`，或者使用更健壮的上下文管理器（如 `try...finally`）来确保在方法退出时状态被清理。但鉴于当前实现已通过新增测试，且主要修复了重入调用的问题，此建议为低优先级。可以添加一个测试，模拟迭代器在消费部分行后抛出异常，然后再次调用 `iter_lines`，验证状态是否正确重置。", 'confidence': 0.7, 'relevance': 0.3, 'severity': 'Low'}, {'type': 'Readability', 'conclusion': '改进代码可读性和状态管理。', 'description': '在 `Response.__init__` 中新增的 `_iter_lines_state` 字典初始化包含了 `"decode_unicode": None` 和 `"delimiter": None` 两个键，用于跟踪上次调用 `iter_lines` 时的参数。在 `iter_lines` 方法中，通过比较当前参数与保存的状态来决定是否重置 `pending` 缓冲区。这种设计是合理的，但字典的键值管理略显松散。如果未来 `iter_lines` 方法增加新的参数，需要手动更新这个字典的初始化和比较逻辑，容易遗漏。', 'evidence': '在 `__init__` 中：
python
        self._iter_lines_state = {
            "pending": None,
            "decode_unicode": None,
            "delimiter": None,
        }

在 `iter_lines` 中：
python
        if (
            state["decode_unicode"] != decode_unicode
            or state["delimiter"] != delimiter
        ):
            state["pending"] = None
            state["decode_unicode"] = decode_unicode
            state["delimiter"] = delimiter
', 'advice': '可以考虑使用一个小的辅助类或 `dataclass` 来封装这个状态，使字段定义更明确，并在 `__init__` 中提供默认值。例如：
python
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class IterLinesState:
    pending: Optional[bytes] = None
    decode_unicode: bool = False
    delimiter: Optional[bytes] = None

# 在 __init__ 中
self._iter_lines_state = IterLinesState()

这样在比较和赋值时可以使用属性访问，提高可读性和类型安全性。不过，鉴于这是一个内部状态且当前改动较小，此建议为优化性质。', 'confidence': 0.8, 'relevance': 0.1, 'severity': 'Low'}]

commits: [{'sha': '53a8c797aaae64fbc851d22b986eb83a625fb71c', 'message': 'Move DigestAuth hash algorithms to use usedforsecurity=False'}]
review_comments:
['## Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data

[Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (MD5) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.
[Sensitive data (id)](2) is used in a hashing algorithm (MD5) that is insecure.

[Show more details](https://github.com/psf/requests/security/code-scanning/17)', '## Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data

[Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA1) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.
[Sensitive data (id)](2) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA1) that is insecure.

[Show more details](https://github.com/psf/requests/security/code-scanning/18)', '## Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data

[Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA256) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.

[Show more details](https://github.com/psf/requests/security/code-scanning/19)', '## Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data

[Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA512) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.

[Show more details](https://github.com/psf/requests/security/code-scanning/20)']

review: [{'type': 'Security', 'conclusion': '为DigestAuth哈希算法添加usedforsecurity=False参数', 'description': '代码变更在多个哈希函数调用中添加了`usedforsecurity=False`参数。这个参数在某些Python版本（如3.9+）中可用，用于标记哈希不用于安全目的。然而，在Digest Authentication（摘要认证）的上下文中，这些哈希函数（MD5、SHA-1、SHA-256、SHA-512）是用于生成认证响应的核心部分，这本质上是一个安全相关的操作。设置`usedforsecurity=False`可能会产生误导，或者在某些严格的安全策略下（如FIPS模式）导致意外行为。虽然提交信息表明这是为了兼容性（可能绕过某些限制），但参数名与功能实际用途存在语义冲突。', 'evidence': '例如：`hashlib.md5(x, usedforsecurity=False).hexdigest()` 和 `hashlib.sha1(s, usedforsecurity=False).hexdigest()[:16]`', 'advice': '建议审查此更改的根本原因。如果是为了在FIPS模式下运行或绕过某些系统限制，应确保这不会削弱认证的安全性。更好的做法可能是：1) 仅在检测到环境需要时才添加此参数（通过版本检查或特性检测）；2) 添加注释说明为何在此安全上下文中使用此参数；3) 考虑是否有更合适的替代哈希算法。', 'confidence': 0.8, 'relevance': 0.3, 'severity': 'Medium'}, {'type': 'Readability', 'conclusion': '为DigestAuth哈希算法添加usedforsecurity=False参数', 'description': '代码变更在四个条件分支和一个独立行中重复添加了相同的参数`usedforsecurity=False`。这导致了代码重复。虽然目前只有几行，但如果未来需要修改此参数或添加其他参数，需要在多个地方进行更改，增加了维护负担和出错风险。', 'evidence': '在`md5_utf8`、`sha_utf8`、`sha256_utf8`、`sha512_utf8`和`cnonce`生成处共五次添加了`usedforsecurity=False`。', 'advice': '建议重构代码以减少重复。可以创建一个通用的哈希函数工厂或辅助函数，它接受算法名称并返回一个配置好的哈希函数。例如：`def _make_hash_func(algorithm_name): ...`，然后在各个分支中调用它。这样，与`usedforsecurity`相关的逻辑只在一处定义。', 'confidence': 0.9, 'relevance': 0.0, 'severity': 'Low'}, {'type': 'Rightness', 'conclusion': '代码主要实现了为摘要认证的哈希调用添加usedforsecurity参数', 'description': '未发现明显的功能错误、性能问题或设计不一致。代码逻辑清晰，变更意图与提交信息相符。', 'evidence': '', 'advice': '', 'confidence': 0.5, 'severity': 'Low'}]

commits:
[{'sha': 'ed724b1e24569d31b5279e6dd5e24401f592ca00', 'message': 'Clarify dependency compatibility warning messages

Replace the vague combined warning "urllib3 (...) or chardet
(...)/charset_normalizer (...) doesn't match a supported version!" with
individual, actionable warnings that identify exactly which dependency
is incompatible and state the supported version range.

This makes it much easier for users to diagnose and resolve the issue,
especially when chardet is pulled in transitively by another package.

Fixes #7284'}]
review_comments: ["Thanks for the PR, @Krishnachaitanyakc. Unfortunately I don't think this is a change we'd take. Chardet gets a major version bump once every 4-5 years historically. The error is intended to show everything in the workspace that may be mismatched, so moving them to individual errors defeats that.\r\n\r\nUsually we ship releases same day as chardet release, or very close, this one has just had some controversy around it. We'll have that addressed in the near future."]

review:
[{'type': 'Readability', 'conclusion': '将依赖版本检查从断言改为警告，提供更清晰的错误信息。', 'description': '代码变更将 `assert` 语句替换为条件判断和 `warnings.warn`，这提高了代码的可读性和用户体验。然而，在 `check_compatibility` 函数中，对 `urllib3` 版本检查的逻辑存在一个潜在的逻辑错误。原代码要求 `urllib3 >= 1.21.1`，但新代码的条件 `if major < 1 or (major == 1 and minor < 21):` 实际上检查的是 `urllib3 < 1.21.0`（因为 `minor < 21`），这遗漏了版本 `1.21.0`。根据语义，`1.21.0` 应该被视为不支持的版本（因为要求 >=1.21.1），但此条件不会触发警告。', 'evidence': 'if major < 1 or (major == 1 and minor < 21):', 'advice': '将条件修改为 `if major < 1 or (major == 1 and minor < 21) or (major == 1 and minor == 21 and patch < 1):` 以精确匹配 `>= 1.21.1`。或者，更清晰的方式是构造一个版本元组进行比较：`if (major, minor, patch) < (1, 21, 1):`。', 'confidence': 0.9, 'relevance': 0.1, 'severity': 'Medium'}, {'type': 'Bug', 'conclusion': '将依赖版本检查从断言改为警告，提供更清晰的错误信息。', 'description': '在 `check_compatibility` 函数中，当解析 `chardet_version` 或 `charset_normalizer_version` 失败（`ValueError`）时，代码会发出警告并 `return`。然而，这个 `return` 语句会提前退出函数，导致后续对 `urllib3` 版本的检查被跳过。这意味着如果字符编码依赖的版本号格式无效，用户将不会收到关于 `urllib3` 版本可能也不兼容的警告。这降低了诊断问题的全面性。', 'evidence': 'except ValueError:
            warnings.warn(
                f"Unable to parse chardet version ({chardet_version}).",
                RequestsDependencyWarning,
            )
            return', 'advice': '移除 `except ValueError` 块中的 `return` 语句，或者将 `return` 改为 `continue`（如果希望继续检查其他依赖）。更好的做法是记录解析错误，但继续执行其他检查。例如，可以设置一个标志或记录错误，然后在函数末尾决定是否返回。目前，为了保持简单，建议直接移除 `return`，让函数继续检查 `urllib3`。', 'confidence': 0.95, 'relevance': 0.1, 'severity': 'Medium'}, {'type': 'Design', 'conclusion': '将依赖版本检查从断言改为警告，提供更清晰的错误信息。', 'description': '在顶层 `try` 块中，捕获的异常类型从 `(AssertionError, ValueError)` 更改为 `(ValueError, TypeError)`。这个变更是合理的，因为内部函数不再使用 `assert`（因此不会抛出 `AssertionError`），并且新增的版本解析逻辑可能因类型转换问题抛出 `TypeError`（例如，`int()` 参数为 `None` 或非数字字符串）。然而，代码审查应确保所有可能引发兼容性检查失败的异常都被适当捕获和处理。目前看来，这个更改是正确且必要的。', 'evidence': 'except (ValueError, TypeError):', 'advice': '无需更改。此变更是对内部逻辑更改的正确适配。', 'confidence': 0.8, 'relevance': 0.1, 'severity': 'Low'}]

commits:
[{'sha': '71f73e543de5ed2b0221e88f4da64fc16ddd7b6b', 'message': 'Fix HTTPDigestAuth with non-latin (bytes) credentials

When username or password are passed as bytes to HTTPDigestAuth,
the f-string formatting produced b'...' repr in the Digest header
(e.g., username="b'Ond\xc5\99ej'" instead of username="Ondřej").

This fix normalizes bytes to str (via UTF-8 decode) at the start of
build_digest_header, ensuring correct header formatting and digest
computation for both bytes and str credentials.

Fixes #6102'}]
review_comments: ['@r266-tech please check for open PRs before creating new ones.']
